mission: Belief-secured intelligence for partners who lead with ethics.

pillars.title: Ethics-Led Intelligence
pillars.description: Confirm every operator honours the morals-first charter.

checks.description: Wallet or ENS identity has verified ethics tag.
Partner has declared a mission aligned with Vaultfire.

pillars.title: Telemetry Trust Fabric
pillars.description: Ensure telemetry routing honours residency and consent gates.

checks.description: Partner supplied telemetry residency policy or opted into defaults.

pillars.title: Resilience Squad
pillars.description: Validate queues, webhooks, and failovers are wired for scale.

checks.description: Partner tested webhook replay + signature validation.
Failover plan exists for manifests and telemetry sinks.

differentiators.summary: Belief-weighted mission loops broadcast confidence to every tenant.
Purposeful Scale guardrails confirm expansions remain ethics-first.
Telemetry trust fabric keeps partner data isolated yet observable.
